title: Sun and Moon Celestial Configuration
description: Change the size of the Sun and Moon!
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/uufvVcG.png)

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Neoforge-1.20%20%7C%201.21-orange?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=D5E0DF&color=D7742F)]() [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric-1.20%20%7C%201.21-orange?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=E5E5E5&color=C6BCA5)]() [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-1.16%20%7C%201.18%20%7C%201.19%20%7C%201.20-orange?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=1E2D44&color=DD984D)]() [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/YouTube-orange?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=DDDDDD&color=2D2D2D&logo=youtube&logoColor=902121)](https://www.youtube.com/@infernalstudiosMC) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-orange?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=D5E0DF&color=7289DA&logo=discord&logoColor=5865F2)](https://infernalstudios.org/discord)

* * *

#### 
📖 About:

Want to spice up your world in a visually interesting, but unobstructive way?   
Now you can do that by changing the sizes of the sun and/or moon with a nifty config!  
  

* * *

#### 
✅ Features:

*   Change the size of the sun and moon!
*   Default settings keep size as-is
*   Config let's you scale height and width
*   Sun and moon can be scaled individually
*   Currently supported on Forge, Neoforge, and Fabric
*   Fabric version requires Fabric API and Cloth Config  
      
    

* * *

#### 
🔧 Configuration:

*   Height and Width mutliplier for the sun
*   Height and Width multiplier fot the moon  
      
    

* * *

####   
🖼️ **Preview:** 

Video example of the mod in action, streamlined using [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) and [Better Mods Button](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-mods-button):
